title: You’ve Got (Too Much) Mail: Behind the Scenes of the 3/25/26 Voice Outage
description: On March 25th, voice and video on Discord suffered major degradation beginning at 12:13 PDT, lasting a little over three hours. Learn how the issue originated, how it affected systems across Discord, how we recovered, and how we’re preventing the same problem from reoccurring.

title: Measure Less to Learn More: Using Fewer, Higher-quality Metrics to Capture What Matters
description: Too many experiment metrics can make meaningful changes harder to detect. Learn how Discord used simulations and Principal Component Analysis to maximize signal and reduce noise.
